---
title: "Feature Engineering and Data Representation Review"
subtitle: "Transformation, Encoding, Leakage, Selection, and Representation Integrity"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Representation question

State the prediction target, prediction time, and feature design goals.

## Feature registry

Document feature names, source fields, transformations, owners, and review status.

## Reproducible example

```{python}
features = 10
approved = 5
needs_revision = 1
print({
    "features": features,
    "approved_share": approved / features,
    "needs_revision_share": needs_revision / features
})
```

## Leakage review

Document cutoff time, prediction-time availability, and training-only transform fitting.

## Dimensionality and sparsity

Review one-hot encodings, feature crosses, embeddings, hashing, and selection.

## Appendix

Preserve source fields, transformation rules, feature quality checks, and review notes.
